title: thymus serpyllum f. istriacus
intro: Thymus serpyllum f. istriacus, also known as wild thyme, is a fragrant and low-growing perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory compounds that have been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of wild thyme include its ability to alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Wild thyme can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support immune function.
